title: Is the 2-Year Treasury at 4.09% Why Bitcoin (BTC) Can’t Break Out?
description: Bitcoin’s (CRYPTO: BTC) latest rally attempt is running into an unexpected wall; the U.S. bond market. While crypto traders focused on ETF flows, institutional adoption, and the recent progress of the CLARITY Act in Washington, another market quietly tightened financial conditions in the background. The U.S. 2-year Treasury yield surged to 4.09%, its highest level ... Is the 2-Year Treasury at 4.09% Why Bitcoin (BTC) Can’t Break Out?
